groupings.title: Understanding
groupings.description: LLM Enhancement skills that use Ontoly's Software Graph to understand repository architecture, frameworks, and onboarding paths.

groupings.title: Change Analysis
groupings.description: LLM Enhancement skills for tracing dependencies and planning safe changes with deterministic graph evidence.

groupings.title: Quality & Risk
